name: Friendship Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare baking sheets.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the sugar for coating with an electric mixer on low speed until just combined.
3. Refrigerate dough to firm slightly for about 20 minutes.
4. Roll into large balls using about 1/4 cup of dough for each cookie or a scant tablespoon for smaller cookies (dough will be soft). Roll in additional sugar to coat.
5. Arrange cookies on baking sheets, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
6. Bake until set, about 15 minutes for large cookies and 10 minutes for smaller ones. Cool on baking sheets for 1 minute before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
